provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Vocational Training Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment, Constitution and Membership of Botswana Training Authority
provisions.title: Establishment of Botswana Training Authority
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of Botswana Training Authority
There is hereby established a training authority to be known as the Botswana Training Authority which shall be a body corporate with a common seal, capable of suing and being sued and subject to the provisions of this Act, of performing such acts as bodies corporate may, by law, perform.

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment, Constitution and Membership of Botswana Training Authority
provisions.title: Principal objectives of Authority
provisions.content:
4. Principal objectives of Authority
The principal objectives of the Authority shall be to—
( a ) co-ordinate vocational training activities in order to achieve better integration and harmonisation of the vocational training system being developed;
( b ) monitor and evaluate the performance of the vocational training system being developed in order to ensure the successful performance of all training activities; and
( c ) advise on policy related issues of vocational training.

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment, Constitution and Membership of Botswana Training Authority
provisions.title: Establishment of Board

definitions.definition: an employee bound by a contract of apprenticeship
the Botswana Training Authority established under section 3

to retrain and re-organise for the purposes of updating and improving skills

employees enrolled in and undergoing an approved programme in vocational training
a private or public centre, organisation, employer or person, providing vocational training

provision of skills, knowledge and attitudes up to certain specified levels of qualification below the technician level.
(2) For the purposes of section 21 of the Act, the national internship programme and retooling shall be deemed to be vocational training.
[4 of 2012, s. 2(b).]
